indicators.name: large white desk
indicators.rationale: A spacious desk provides ample workspace for a computer and other accessories.

indicators.name: ergonomic black office chair
indicators.rationale: An ergonomic chair with armrests and wheels supports long periods of sitting.

indicators.name: directional desk lamp
indicators.rationale: A desk lamp can provide focused task lighting for the computer screen.

indicators.name: closed door
indicators.rationale: A closed door provides privacy and reduces distractions.

indicators.name: bookshelf with reference materials
indicators.rationale: Books and reference materials indicate a knowledge work environment.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The large desk and ergonomic chair provide a functional workspace, while the closed door offers privacy. However, the lack of a dedicated workspace layout and directional lighting limits the suitability.
